title: bonnaya ciliata
intro: Bonnaya ciliata, also known as red balsam, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bonnaya ciliata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and treat various infections, as well as its role in supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
